questions.text: What does the Pricing Procedure define in a sales process?
options: A complete structure of terms and conditions, including prices, discounts, and surcharges

questions.text: What is the benefit of using the Manage Prices: Sales Fiori App for pricing conditions?
options: It allows pricing conditions to be updated manually only
It provides an easier update of pricing conditions and improves business efficiency
It only allows export of pricing conditions

questions.text: What does the 'Access Sequence' in a pricing procedure determine?
options: The type of discount to apply
The search pattern used to identify valid data for a pricing condition type
The final amount on the invoice

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT a component of the AFP Pricing Procedure for SO types?
Which step in the NEO pricing procedure for AFP Sales Orders ensures that freight adjustments are made at the invoice time?
